<!-- Keep this PR focused: one feature or one tightly coupled change. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related feature / issue

<!-- e.g. F001 repository foundation, or a linked issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore / ci / build — tooling or pipeline

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is short-lived and rebased on `main`.
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): summary`).
- [ ] `scripts/check.ps1` (or `scripts/check.sh`) passes locally.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` values are committed.
- [ ] Any free-tier / Z0 / quota claim is backed by official evidence.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavioural changes (not weakened to pass).
- [ ] Documentation was updated where relevant.

## Evidence / verification

<!-- Paste command output, screenshots, or evaluator results as appropriate. -->
